query:
INSERT INTO ai_agent_tools (deployment_id, agent_id, tool_id, approval_action)
            SELECT $1, a.id, t.id, $4
            FROM ai_agents a
            JOIN ai_tools t ON t.id = $3 AND t.deployment_id = $1
            WHERE a.id = $2 AND a.deployment_id = $1
            ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
